positive: Minimalist line art drawing of a stylized forest silhouette under a large, crescent moon. The scene features several layers of flora, including ferns, wispy trees, and various exotic leaves, arranged in a balanced, circular composition. Use deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and warm gold accents against a crisp off-white background. The style should be vintage botanical illustration meets modern graphic design, with a strong, consistent black ink outlining (line art) and bold color blocking for maximum apparel print contrast. The overall mood is magical and calm, designed for high contrast textile application.
